title: Balizia pedicellaris
taxonomy: Balizia pedicellaris is classified under the family Arecaceae and the genus Balizia. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Magnoliophyta. The class is Magnoliopsida, and the order are the Arecales. This classification places Balizia pedicellaris within the category of palms. This detailed classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
